headline: Persian Gulf crisis claims a corporate victim as gold stock resets plans
summary: Miners mine. They punch or scrape holes in the earth and pull out ores that, ultimately, get turned into something else. Like gold. Or copper or aluminum, processed from bauxite. Mining is also a messy business, usually done in remote, difficult environments. And it usually leaves tons of material, ...
